title: betula alba var. communis
intro: Betula alba var. communis, also known as the European white birch, is a small deciduous tree or shrub belonging to the Betulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Betula alba var. communis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
